title: EDHOC: edhoc_kdf label max length may truncate labels
description:
CORRECTNESS: edhoc_kdf uses zcbor_tstr_put_term with max_len=32, which may truncate labels silently.

Location: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:199

if (!zcbor_tstr_put_term(zse, label, 32)) {
    return -EINVAL;
}

Current EDHOC labels (RFC 9528) are short:
- 'KEYSTREAM_2' (11 chars)
- 'MAC_2', 'MAC_3' (5 chars)
- 'K_3', 'IV_3' (3-4 chars)
- 'OSCORE_Master_Secret' (20 chars)
- 'OSCORE_Master_Salt' (18 chars)

All current labels fit within 32 bytes. However, if EDHOC is extended with longer labels, this could cause silent truncation and key derivation failures.

Impact: Low currently, but potential future bug if labels exceed 32 chars.

Fix: Use strlen(label) instead of hardcoded 32, or validate label length explicitly.

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:199
close_reason: label truncation fixed using strlen for zcbor_tstr_put_term maxlen
